Blogs.title: How to uninstall old versions of .NET Core
Blogs.descr: Uninstalling old versions of .NET Core used to be a tedious process, so much that I still had previews of 2.0 installed. But now it's super easy thanks to the newly released .NET Core Uninstall Tool. Have a look at how it works…
